subcodes.first_line: O Salman! Thou wert commanded by the All-Merciful to conduct thyself with wisdom and speak with prudence, lest perchance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلمان من لدی الرحمن مامور بودی که بحکمت رفتار نمائی و تکلم کنی که مبادا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
